Signals: - Compeller: Solving employee onboarding and tooling access at scale drives clear organizational adoption of Glean. | - Accelerator: Easy UI and seamless enterprise app integrations (Slack, Google Sheets) amplify usage and reduce friction post-adoption. | - Differentiator: Breadth of enterprise app integrations and agent capability with complete prompts distinguishes Glean from alternatives. | - Stabilizer: A functional, intuitive user interface meets baseline expectations required for the product to be seriously considered. | - Inhibitor: Inconsistent agent output accuracy — such as returning incorrect or unformatted hyperlinks despite complete instructions — erodes trust and slows deeper reliance on the tool.
